user.title: Connect ORVIBO Cloud
user.description: Sign in with the account used by HomeMate or ZhiJia365.

family.title: Select family
family.description: Choose the family this integration should use.

devices.title: Select devices
devices.description: Only checked devices will be added to Home Assistant.

area.title: Assign device area
area.description: Choose an area for {device} ({position} of {total}). The ORVIBO room is {room}.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to ORVIBO Cloud.
error.invalid_auth: The account or password is invalid.
error.no_families: No family was found for this account.

abort.already_configured: This ORVIBO account is already configured.
abort.no_devices: No devices were found in the selected family.
abort.unknown: The configuration flow lost its account state.
